e.p: Are you here for the tour?
e.m: 1. Nói tên bằng placeholder. 2. Xác nhận bạn ở điểm hẹn.
e.h: My name is [studentName]. + I am here (present simple).
e.s: My name is [studentName]. I am here for the tour.

e.p: Do you need help with your luggage?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có hoặc không. 2. Nếu có, nói việc cần giúp ngắn gọn.
e.h: Yes, please / No, thanks + because / I need ...
e.s: Yes, please, I have one heavy bag and I need help. Please carry it to the bus.

e.p: The bus will leave in 10 minutes. Are you ready?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn sẵn sàng hay không. 2. Nếu không, cho biết lý do ngắn.
e.h: I'm ready / I'm not ready + because ... (past/simple).
e.s: I'm not ready because my bag is outside. I will bring it now.

e.p: Would you like a map of the city?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn có muốn bản đồ hay không. 2. Nếu có, nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Yes, please + because ... / No, thanks + because ...
e.s: Yes, please because I want to find places by myself. It will help me plan the afternoon.

e.p: Do you prefer walking or using the bus for the tour?
e.m: 1. Chọn walking hoặc bus. 2. Nói lý do so sánh ngắn.
e.h: I prefer ... because it is more/less ... than ...
e.s: I prefer walking because it is more comfortable than the bus. I can see more places on foot.

d.t: Giới thiệu sở thích khi tham quan

e.p: What kind of places do you like to visit?
e.m: 1. Nói 1-2 loại địa điểm bạn thích. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: I like ... because ... (present simple).
e.s: I like beaches and markets because I enjoy the sea and local food. They are relaxed and fun.

e.p: Do you prefer busy markets or quiet museums?
e.m: 1. Chọn một trong hai. 2. Nêu lý do với so sánh ngắn.
e.h: I prefer ... because it is more ... than ...
e.s: I prefer busy markets because they are more interesting than museums. The markets have many colors and food.

e.p: How often do you travel in a year?
e.m: 1. Nói tần suất ngắn (once, twice...). 2. Nói khi bạn thường đi (mùa/thời gian).
e.h: I travel ... a year. / I usually travel in ...
e.s: I travel twice a year. I usually go during the summer.

e.p: Are you interested in trying local food today?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nói nếu bạn có dị ứng ngắn hoặc yêu cầu.
e.h: Yes, I'd like to ... / No, I can't ... + because ...
e.s: Yes, I'd like to try local food but I am allergic to peanuts. Please tell me which dishes are safe.

e.p: Would you like me to arrange a slower walk for senior members?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, đề xuất điều chỉnh ngắn (more stops/less walking).
e.h: Yes, please + we can ... / I will ...
e.s: Yes, please, we can make more stops and walk shorter distances. That will be better for everyone.

e.p: The tour includes a museum visit at 10 AM. Is that okay?
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc đề nghị thay đổi. 2. Nếu đổi, đề xuất thời gian khác ngắn.
e.h: Yes, that's fine. / Can we change it to ...?
e.s: Yes, that's fine. I will be ready at 10 AM.

e.p: We will have lunch after the beach. Do you prefer packed lunch or a restaurant?
e.m: 1. Chọn packed lunch hoặc restaurant. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: I prefer ... because ...
e.s: I prefer a restaurant because I want a warm meal. It is more comfortable after the beach.

e.p: Yesterday the guide changed the plan, did you like the new stop?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn có thích hay không (past simple). 2. Giải thích lý do ngắn.
e.h: I liked / I didn't like + because ... (past simple).
e.s: I liked the new stop because it was quieter than the busy places. The view was beautiful.

e.p: If it rains tomorrow, we will go to the indoor market. Is that ok?
e.m: 1. Trả lời đồng ý/không. 2. Nếu không, đề xuất phương án khác ngắn.
e.h: That's ok / But we can ... / I will ...
e.s: That's ok, but we can visit the museum instead because I prefer indoor places when it rains. I will buy an umbrella if needed.

e.p: Do you want to add a free time slot in the afternoon?
e.m: 1. Chọn yes/no. 2. Nếu yes, nêu hoạt động bạn sẽ làm (shopping/rest/beach).
e.h: Yes, I want ... + I will / I'm going to ...
e.s: Yes, I want free time. I am going to walk in the market and buy some souvenirs.

d.t: Vé, phí và phương thức thanh toán

e.p: How much is the entrance ticket for the temple?
e.m: 1. Nói giá ngắn. 2. Nói nếu bạn có giảm giá sinh viên hay không.
e.h: It costs ... / I have / I don't have a student card.
e.s: It costs $10 per person. I don't have a student card.

e.p: Do you pay by cash or card?
e.m: 1. Chỉ phương thức bạn dùng. 2. Nói nếu phương thức đó thường hoạt động ở đây.
e.h: I will pay by ... / It usually works ...
e.s: I will pay by card. It usually works at the ticket office.

e.p: There is a group discount for five people. Can you join with others?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nói số người tham gia (bao gồm bạn).
e.h: Yes, we can join. / There will be ... people including me.
e.s: Yes, we can join the group. There will be six people including me.

e.p: You must keep your ticket until the end. Do you understand?
e.m: 1. Xác nhận hiểu dùng must/have to. 2. Nói sẽ cất vé ở đâu ngắn.
e.h: I understand, I will ... / I must ...
e.s: I understand and I will keep my ticket in my bag. I must show it when needed.

e.p: If you buy a city pass, you can visit more places cheaper. Do you want it?
e.m: 1. Chọn yes/no. 2. Nếu yes, nêu lợi ích ngắn dùng comparative.
e.h: Yes, please + because it's cheaper than ... / It lets me ...
e.s: Yes, please because the city pass is cheaper than single tickets. It lets me visit more places.

d.t: Hướng dẫn đi bộ tham quan

e.p: Please stay behind the guide and keep the group together. Can you do that?
e.m: 1. Xác nhận bạn sẽ làm theo. 2. Nói nếu bạn cần tốc độ chậm hơn hoặc trợ giúp.
e.h: I will ... / I need ... / I can ...
e.s: I will stay behind the guide and keep with the group. I need a slower pace, please.

e.p: The path is steep here, be careful. Do you have proper shoes?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu không, nêu bạn sẽ làm gì để an toàn.
e.h: Yes, I have ... / No, I don't + I will ...
e.s: No, I don't have hiking shoes. I will walk slowly and hold the handrail.

e.p: We will stop for photos in five minutes. Would you like extra time?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nếu yes, nói bạn sẽ làm gì trong thời gian đó.
e.h: Yes, please + I will ... / I'm going to ...
e.s: Yes, please, I will take more photos and rest for a short time. Then I will catch up.

e.p: There is a small fee to enter the old house. Can everyone pay now?
e.m: 1. Trả lời khả năng thanh toán. 2. Nếu không, đề xuất ai sẽ trả hoặc cách trả sau.
e.h: We can pay now / I will pay / They can pay later
e.s: We can pay now, I will give my card. If someone can't, they can pay later.

e.p: If you feel tired, you should tell me early. How will you tell the guide?
e.m: 1. Viết câu bạn sẽ nói ngắn. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì sau đó (rest/sit/return to bus).
e.h: I will say: '...' + I will ...
e.s: I will say 'I am tired, I need a rest.' Then I will sit or return to the bus.

d.t: Thời tiết và trang phục phù hợp

e.p: The forecast is sunny today. Do you have sunglasses?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu không, nói bạn sẽ làm gì (mua/mượn).
e.h: Yes, I have ... / No, I don't + I will ...
e.s: No, I don't have sunglasses. I will buy a cheap pair at the market.

e.p: It may be windy at the cliff. Would you prefer a jacket?
e.m: 1. Chọn jacket yes/no. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn với so sánh.
e.h: I prefer ... because it is warmer than ...
e.s: Yes, I prefer a jacket because it is warmer than a shirt. I will bring it to the cliff.

e.p: If it rains, we will stay inside the cafe. Do you have rain gear?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu không, nói bạn sẽ làm gì (mua/chia sẻ).
e.h: I have ... / I don't have ... + I will ...
e.s: I don't have rain gear, but I will buy an umbrella. We will share if needed.

e.p: The sun is strong at noon, you must use sunscreen. Do you understand?
e.m: 1. Xác nhận hiểu dùng must/have to. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì ngay bây giờ.
e.h: I understand, I must ... / I will ...
e.s: I understand, I must use sunscreen. I will put it on now.

e.p: Which is better for this trip, light clothes or warm clothes?
e.m: 1. Chọn light hoặc warm. 2. Giải thích ngắn với so sánh.
e.h: Light clothes are better because they are more ... than ...
e.s: Light clothes are better because they are more comfortable than warm clothes in hot weather. I will wear light clothes.

d.t: Ăn trưa, dị ứng và sở thích ăn uống

e.p: We have a vegetarian option for lunch. Do you want it?
e.m: 1. Chọn yes/no. 2. Nếu không, nói bạn sẽ ăn gì.
e.h: Yes, I want ... / No, I will take ...
e.s: No, I will take the chicken meal. I don't mind some meat.

e.p: Are you allergic to any food?
e.m: 1. Nói nếu bạn bị dị ứng (nói rõ thứ). 2. Yêu cầu hướng dẫn viên ghi chú hoặc tránh món đó.
e.h: I am allergic to ... + Please don't serve ...
e.s: I am allergic to peanuts. Please tell the chef and don't serve dishes with peanuts.

e.p: We can have lunch at a local home or a restaurant. Which do you prefer?
e.m: 1. Chọn home hoặc restaurant. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: I prefer ... because ...
e.s: I prefer a restaurant because it is cleaner and faster than a home meal. I feel more comfortable.

e.p: Do you want tea or coffee after lunch?
e.m: 1. Chọn tea hoặc coffee. 2. Nêu nếu bạn cần sugar hoặc milk.
e.h: I want ... with ... / I don't need ...
e.s: I want coffee with milk, please. I don't need sugar.

e.p: If you are full, you should stop eating. How will you tell the host politely?
e.m: 1. Viết 1 câu lịch sự để nói ngừng ăn. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì tiếp theo (rest/walk).
e.h: I'm full, thank you + I will ...
e.s: I'm full, thank you, the food was excellent. I will rest for a while.

d.t: Mua sắm tại chợ địa phương

e.p: Would you like to look at some handmade goods?
e.m: 1. Chọn yes/no. 2. Nếu có, nói loại hàng bạn muốn xem.
e.h: Yes, I would like to see ... / No, thanks
e.s: Yes, I would like to see handmade bags and textiles. They look interesting.

e.p: The seller asks for $20, can you offer a lower price?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn sẽ trả bao nhiêu. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn cho giá đó.
e.h: I can pay $... because ... / It's too expensive
e.s: I can pay $15 because it's a bit expensive for my budget. It is cheaper than the original price.

e.p: Do you want a plastic bag or will you use your own?
e.m: 1. Chọn plastic bag hay dùng túi riêng. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn (environment/convenience).
e.h: I will use my own because ... / No thanks
e.s: I will use my own bag because it's better for the environment. It is more comfortable to carry.

e.p: Try it on, does the shirt fit?
e.m: 1. Nói có vừa hay không. 2. Nếu không, nói size bạn cần hoặc hỏi màu khác.
e.h: It fits. / It doesn't fit, I need size ...
e.s: It doesn't fit, I need a larger size. Do you have it in blue?

e.p: If you want a receipt, ask the seller. How will you ask politely?
e.m: 1. Viết 1 câu yêu cầu hóa đơn. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì với hóa đơn (giữ cho khoản chi).
e.h: Could I have a receipt, please? + I will keep it for ...
e.s: Could I have a receipt, please? I will keep it for my expense record.

d.t: Thay đổi phương tiện di chuyển

e.p: The train is delayed by one hour. Do you want to wait?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nếu không, đề xuất phương án khác (bus/taxi).
e.h: No, let's take a ... / Yes, I will wait
e.s: No, let's take a bus because it is faster than waiting. I will buy tickets now.

e.p: We can take a taxi, but it's more expensive. Do you agree?
e.m: 1. Đồng ý hoặc không. 2. Nếu đồng ý, nói ai sẽ trả hoặc chia tiền.
e.h: I agree + I will pay / We can split the cost
e.s: I agree and I will pay for my share. We can split the cost among four people.

e.p: If the boat is full, we will go to the next harbor. Is that acceptable?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nếu không, đề xuất phương án thay thế ngắn.
e.h: Yes, that's fine / No, we can ...
e.s: Yes, that's fine, we can wait or visit the nearby cafe. I will stay close to the group.

e.p: The bus seat is smaller than expected. Would you like to change?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nếu yes, nêu bạn muốn chỗ nào (aisle/window) và lý do ngắn.
e.h: I prefer an aisle/window seat because it is more ... than ...
e.s: Yes, I prefer an aisle seat because it is more comfortable than a window seat for me. Please help me change.

e.p: You must show your ticket to the driver before boarding. How will you present it?
e.m: 1. Mô tả hành động (take ticket out, show). 2. Nói bạn sẽ cất vé ở đâu sau khi trình.
e.h: I will take my ticket out and show it. Then I will keep it in ...
e.s: I will take my ticket out and show it to the driver. Then I will keep it in my pocket.

d.t: Quy tắc an toàn tại điểm tham quan

e.p: Please do not touch the artifacts. Can you follow this rule?
e.m: 1. Xác nhận bạn sẽ không chạm. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì thay vì chạm (chụp ảnh, đọc biển).
e.h: I won't ... / I will ...
e.s: I won't touch the artifacts. I will take photos from a distance and read the signs.

e.p: Children must stay with an adult. Will you watch the child in your group?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nêu cách bạn sẽ trông (hold hand, stay close).
e.h: Yes, I will ... / I will ...
e.s: Yes, I will watch the child and hold their hand. I will stay close during the visit.

e.p: Smoking is not allowed here. What will you do if you need to smoke?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì (đi chỗ quy định hoặc chờ). 2. Nêu khi nào bạn sẽ làm (after break).
e.h: I will wait until ... / I will go to ...
e.s: I will wait until the break and then go to the designated area. I will not smoke inside.

e.p: There is a low railing, be careful. If you fall, you must go to the first aid. Do you understand?
e.m: 1. Xác nhận hiểu dùng must/have to. 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm nếu thấy người bị thương.
e.h: I understand, I must ... / I will ...
e.s: I understand and I must go to the first aid if I fall. I will help others and call the guide.

e.p: For safety, we will split into two small groups. How will you communicate with group 2?
e.m: 1. Nói phương thức liên lạc (phone/meet point). 2. Nêu thời gian hoặc điểm gặp ngắn.
e.h: We will meet at ... / I will call if ...
e.s: We will meet group 2 at the old gate in ten minutes. I will call if we are late.

d.t: Tiếp cận cho người có nhu cầu đặc biệt

e.p: Do you need wheelchair access at the museum?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nêu yêu cầu ngắn (ramp/elevator) và yêu cầu sắp xếp.
e.h: Yes, I need ... + Please arrange ...
e.s: Yes, I need wheelchair access and an elevator. Please arrange it for me.

e.p: We can provide a quiet room for breaks. Would that help?
e.m: 1. Chọn yes/no. 2. Nếu có, nói tần suất bạn dùng (often/sometimes).
e.h: Yes, it helps + I often / sometimes ...
e.s: Yes, it helps and I will use it sometimes during the tour. I need short breaks often.

e.p: If you have hearing difficulty, I can speak slowly or use written notes. Which do you prefer?
e.m: 1. Chọn speak slowly hoặc written notes. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: I prefer ... because ...
e.s: I prefer written notes because I can read and understand better than listening. It is clearer for me.

e.p: We must know about medical needs before the trip. Do you have any medication?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không. 2. Nếu có, nêu tên thuốc ngắn và yêu cầu hướng dẫn viên hỗ trợ.
e.h: Yes, I have ... + Please remind me to ... / keep it safe
e.s: Yes, I have medicine for asthma. Please remind me to take it and keep it safe.

e.p: For service dogs, there are rules. Will your dog sit quietly or need breaks?
e.m: 1. Mô tả hành vi của chó (sit quietly/need breaks). 2. Nói bạn sẽ làm gì để chăm sóc (water/rest).
e.h: It will ... + I will ...
e.s: The dog will sit quietly most of the time. I will give it water and short breaks.

d.t: Phản hồi và mẹo du lịch

e.p: Did you enjoy today's tour?
e.m: 1. Trả lời có/không (past simple). 2. Nếu có, nêu 1 điều bạn thích.
e.h: I enjoyed / I didn't enjoy + because ...
e.s: Yes, I enjoyed today's tour because the guide explained well. I liked the beach the most.

e.p: What could be better for the next tour?
e.m: 1. Nêu 1 đề xuất ngắn (more breaks/less walking). 2. Giải thích lý do ngắn.
e.h: We should have ... because ... / It would be better if ...
e.s: We should have more breaks because some places are tiring. That will help older people.

e.p: Would you recommend this tour to friends?
e.m: 1. Trả lời yes/no. 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Yes, I would recommend ... because ...
e.s: Yes, I would recommend this tour because it is affordable and interesting. Friends will enjoy the local food.

e.p: Please give one tip for new visitors to this city.
e.m: 1. Viết 1 tip ngắn (bring cash/use public transport). 2. Nêu lý do ngắn.
e.h: Bring ... / Use ... because ...
e.s: Bring cash for small shops because cards are not always accepted. Cash helps you buy local goods.

e.p: If you had a problem, you must tell the office. How would you describe a lost item?
e.m: 1. Mô tả món đồ mất (item, color). 2. Nói nơi và thời gian bạn mất nó (place, time).
e.h: I lost ... at ... this morning/yesterday
e.s: I lost a small black camera at the market this morning. I think I left it near the blue stall.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giao tiếp cơ bản với hướng dẫn viên

e.p: Your guide asks if you have any questions before the trip starts. What will you ask?
e.m: 1. Hỏi 1 câu về thời gian hoặc điểm dừng. 2. Hỏi 1 câu về an toàn hoặc phí.
e.h: What time will ...? / Do we have to ...?
e.s: What time will we return to the hotel? Do we have to pay extra for the boat?

e.p: The guide offers two schedules: faster or relaxed. Which do you choose and why?
e.m: 1. Chọn faster hoặc relaxed. 2. Nêu 1 lý do dùng comparative.
e.h: I choose ... because it is less/more ... than ...
e.s: I choose the relaxed schedule because it is less tiring than the faster one. I can enjoy more stops.

e.p: Someone lost a bag on the bus. The guide asks who it belongs to. How will you respond?
e.m: 1. Nói sở hữu ngắn (It's mine/It's not mine). 2. Nếu của bạn, mô tả màu và một đặc điểm.
e.h: It's mine / It's not mine + It's a ... with ...
e.s: It's mine, it's a blue backpack with a small red tag. I left it on the seat.

e.p: You met a local who speaks little English. How do you ask for a restaurant recommendation?
e.m: 1. Hỏi tên nhà hàng hoặc món ăn. 2. Cảm ơn và nói bạn sẽ thử.
e.h: Where can I find ...? / I will try it
e.s: Where can I find a good local restaurant with seafood? Thank you, I will try it tonight.

e.p: Before leaving the site, the guide asks for quick feedback. Give one good point and one improvement.
e.m: 1. Nêu 1 điểm tốt. 2. Nêu 1 điều cần cải thiện.
e.h: Use past simple for praise + suggestion 'more ...' or 'less ...'
e.s: The guide explained the history well and we enjoyed it. It would be better to have more breaks.

d.t: Ôn tập: Xử lý vấn đề khi đi tour

e.p: The bus broke down and the guide says we will wait. What will you do?
e.m: 1. Nói hành động bạn sẽ làm trong lúc chờ. 2. Nói nếu bạn sẽ giúp gì (carry bags).
e.h: I will ... / I can ...
e.s: I will read my book and wait with the group. I can help carry small bags if needed.

e.p: A member feels sick and needs a doctor. How will you tell the office?
e.m: 1. Mô tả triệu chứng ngắn (nausea, headache). 2. Yêu cầu gọi bác sĩ hoặc đưa tới phòng khám.
e.h: He/She has ... + Please call ... / take to ...
e.s: She has a headache and feels dizzy. Please call a doctor or take her to the clinic.

e.p: The guide says the museum is closed today. How will you ask for an alternative plan?
e.m: 1. Hỏi kế hoạch thay thế. 2. Đề nghị một hoạt động khác ngắn.
e.h: What will we do instead? / We can ...
e.s: What will we do instead of the museum? We can visit the local market or a cafe.

e.p: You paid by card but the machine failed. The seller asks if you can pay cash. What do you say?
e.m: 1. Nói bạn có cash hay không. 2. Nếu không, đề nghị phương án khác (ATM/pay later).
e.h: I have cash / I don't have cash, I will ...
e.s: I don't have cash, but I will go to the ATM and return soon. Or I can pay by card later.

e.p: If someone loses their passport, the guide asks for immediate steps. What will you suggest?
e.m: 1. Nêu bước báo cảnh sát. 2. Nói liên hệ đại sứ quán hoặc văn phòng và ai sẽ làm.
e.h: We should ... and then ... / I will ...
e.s: We should report it to the police first and then contact the embassy. I will help call and make the report.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giao tiếp nâng cao với hướng dẫn viên

e.p: You want a slower pace because of the heat. How will you ask the guide?
e.m: 1. Yêu cầu chậm lại (Can we/Should we). 2. Nêu lý do và gợi ý (more water breaks).
e.h: Can we ... because ... / We should ...
e.s: Can we slow the pace because it is too hot? We should have more water breaks.

e.p: Compare two sites: the old temple and the new museum. Which one is better for photos?
e.m: 1. Chọn nơi tốt hơn dùng comparative. 2. Giải thích ngắn lý do.
e.h: X is better for photos than Y because ... / more ... than ...
e.s: The old temple is better for photos than the museum because it has more traditional colors and views. The light is nicer there.

e.p: The guide reminds everyone to respect local customs. How will you promise to follow?
e.m: 1. Dùng must/should để khẳng định. 2. Nêu 1 hành động cụ thể bạn sẽ làm.
e.h: I must/should ... + I will ...
e.s: I must respect local customs and I will cover my shoulders in the temple. I will also remove my shoes when asked.

e.p: You want the guide to recommend a cheaper restaurant. How do you ask and compare prices?
e.m: 1. Hỏi nhà hàng rẻ hơn. 2. Nói ngân sách ngắn và yêu cầu so sánh.
e.h: Is there a restaurant cheaper than ...? My budget is ...
e.s: Is there a restaurant cheaper than the one near the market? My budget is about $10 per person.

e.p: At the end, you must give a short review: mention one strong point and one thing they must improve. Write it.
e.m: 1. Nêu 1 điểm mạnh (past simple). 2. Nêu 1 điều họ must cải thiện.
e.h: Praise in past simple + 'They must ...'
e.s: The guide explained places clearly and everyone enjoyed the stories. They must provide more water and rest stops.
